creator: stevedav@pacbell.net
text:
Gnucash 1.4.9 fails to install even though the ports collection
was recently cvsup'ed.
It looks like a problem with scheme48.

Fix: 

Fix the port.
How-To-Repeat: cvsup -g -L 2 /usr/share/examples/cvsup/ports-supfile
	[All ports updated]
cd /usr/ports/deskutils/gnucash
make
	[works]
make install
[...]
 ",batch off";  echo ",dump slib.image \"(slib 2c9)\"";  echo ",exit") | scheme48
scheme48: not found
*** Error code 127 (ignored)
touch slib48
===>  Installing for slib-2c9
===>   Generating temporary packing list
#       moved here from author's makefile
/usr/bin/touch -r /usr/ports/lang/slib/work/slib/slibcat /usr/local/lib/scheme48/slibcat
touch: /usr/local/lib/scheme48/slibcat: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1
 
Stop in /usr/ports/lang/slib.
*** Error code 1
 
Stop in /usr/ports/lang/slib.
*** Error code 1
 
Stop in /usr/ports/lang/slib.
*** Error code 1
 
Stop in /usr/ports/deskutils/gnucash.
*** Error code 1
 
Stop in /usr/ports/deskutils/gnucash.
*** Error code 1
 
Stop in /usr/ports/deskutils/gnucash.
root@monarch:/usr/ports/deskutils/gnucash 112% cd ../../lang
root@monarch:/usr/ports/lang 113% cd sch
scheme48/  schemetoc/
root@monarch:/usr/ports/lang 113% cd scheme48
root@monarch:/usr/ports/lang/scheme48 114% lc
total 9
1 Makefile      1 README.html   1 distinfo      1 pkg-comment   1 pkg-descr     4 pkg-plist
root@monarch:/usr/ports/lang/scheme48 115% make
===>  scheme48-0.53 is forbidden: emails love notes to authors on install.
